schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection + 1st refill + regulator for BPL women
schemes.eligibility: BPL women without any existing LPG connection

schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar (Muft Bijli Yojana)
schemes.benefit: 300 units free electricity/month via rooftop solar + subsidy up to Rs 78K

schemes.name: KUSUM Scheme (Solar for Farmers)
schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pump + 25 years income from solar power
schemes.eligibility: Farmers with or without grid connectivity

schemes.name: Saubhagya (Household Electrification)
schemes.benefit: Free electricity connection to BPL households
schemes.eligibility: Un-electrified households (BPL: free, others: Rs 500 in installments)

schemes.name: Gram Ujala Programme
schemes.benefit: LED bulbs at Rs 10/piece for rural homes
schemes.eligibility: Rural electricity consumers against old incandescent bulbs

schemes.name: PM PAHAL (Direct Benefit for LPG)
schemes.benefit: LPG subsidy directly transferred to bank account (DBTL)
schemes.eligibility: All LPG consumers who surrender subsidy eligibility voluntarily excluded

schemes.name: National Solar Mission (Grid-Connected)
schemes.benefit: Rooftop solar subsidy 20-40% for residential and institutional

schemes.name: Biogas Scheme (New National Biogas Programme)
schemes.benefit: Rs 7,000-20,000 subsidy for family-type biogas plants

schemes.name: PM E-Bus Sewa
schemes.benefit: Electric bus connectivity for tier 2/3 cities

schemes.name: Energy Efficiency Scheme for MSMEs
schemes.benefit: Subsidized energy audit + financing for energy efficiency upgrades

schemes.name: National Wind-Solar Hybrid Policy
schemes.benefit: Better grid access and PPAs for hybrid renewable energy projects
schemes.eligibility: Renewable energy project developers and investors

schemes.name: Solar Charkha Mission
schemes.benefit: Solar-powered charkha units + subsidy for handloom weavers
schemes.eligibility: Handloom weavers, artisans in notified clusters

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri JI-VAN Yojana (Biofuel)
schemes.benefit: Financial support for 2G ethanol bio-refineries (Rs 1969.50 crore total)

schemes.name: National Clean Air Programme (NCAP)
schemes.benefit: Cleaner air initiatives, EV subsidies, clean fuel access in polluted cities
